description_long: This object depicts a modern apartment complex consisting of six tall, rectangular buildings arranged in a grid-like formation on a raised platform. The buildings are clad in blue-green facades with white window frames, and each structure features multiple evenly spaced windows on all sides, giving a sense of uniformity and order. Between the buildings, there is a landscaped courtyard area with several trees, street lamps, and benches, creating a communal outdoor space. The platform base is dark gray and slightly elevated, with paved walkways connecting the buildings and amenities. The overall design is clean and geometric, with sharp edges and a focus on verticality. The scene is reminiscent of a contemporary urban residential development, emphasizing functionality and communal living.
description: A group of six modern, blue-green apartment buildings with white windows, arranged around a landscaped courtyard with trees, benches, and street lamps on a raised gray platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing five apartment buildings in a row, with the sixth building set back and angled to the left; street lamps and trees are visible in the courtyard behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staggered arrangement of the buildings, the landscaped courtyard with trees and lamps, and benches along the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the courtyard with trees and lamps in the center, benches on the left, and the sixth building set back on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the five buildings in a row with the sixth building set back and angled to the right; courtyard features are partially visible behind.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with even vertical and horizontal spacing on all building facades, creating a symmetrical and orderly appearance.
